hab11c9feg865cg4b0cg9a69g9c455cd4ddef: So, you put her down? If you're here to do the same to me, be warned. I don't die easy.
h79c5daafg570bg47ddga8b9g483fb1392a7c: She asked me to. It was a mercy.
h582e59d6gc906g4c9fg8644g0441e90475ac: Keep your mercy to yourself, then.
hb2f5d3e6g01adg4499g8472g1316fdc1bea9: She attacked me. I had no choice.
h8eb7a8ccg454cg4f29gba9dgaf9a27951e38: You could have let her kill you. But no, you chose to survive.
h89691048g15c1g49c3gaa38gb28652b7578c: I'll make the same choice, I think. I'm not going to become one of those creatures.
h175ba52cg704eg4017gac7dg1e1cb1cb62f7: I just want to talk. To help.
hc9ab2244gd442g4437g9d0eg21ea27463bfe: Keep talking and I might test that theory.
hd1f301f5g1fcfg426fg8d96g76614e89fd55: The Hells with you! I don't need your whimpering. There are other ways out.
h88ef1a23gbef2g41acg863ag0570ff51c061: You feel it too? The change?
h5a9f93c0g08cbg4b9dgb041g4e2a2b9efa47: Yes, but I'm going to survive. No matter what it takes.
h8abd092ag2d12g43cegb7a8g65a9015c9bb4: Yes, and if you're here to reconsider my kind offer of a quick and easy death, I'm a little busy.
h3b4b119bg7bacg4894g8c73g3bac75c72648: If we last through the night, I'll gladly butcher you in the morning, though.
h04667247ge4d3g4c82g9f34g3e21f437113d: As for me, I'm going to survive. No matter what it takes.
h34d5e8f1g39e8g4dadg997cgcb52ad469b4c: Yes, although if you're here to ask for a quick and easy death, I'm a little busy.
h6e2bdc00g1a42g496fgb265g616fdb3ce799: I'm sure you can find someone else to poison you.
h5d035603g4856g4c88g8eb2g24048bceeccc: I'm sure you can find someone else to stab you.
had4a3a55gb999g46e1ga114g06d43918f1b3: I'm sure you can find someone else to cut off your lovely head.
hf1b00ac8g1592g4f16ga394g1d9582ddda12: Talk to me. I can help.
hffed8b19ga337g4f94g80d6g0c121278378b: I - I feel awful. My head's pounding, my teeth are loose, I can barely see straight.
heb5b2073gf074g426dg8b6cg2158ffeec4cb: This is it. The beginning of the end.
h0be0a7eeg2331g45d0gae95g8314d562685a: What are we going to do?
h088c2dc6g90a3g4306ga725g4d9219ac991c: We're still alive - so it's not over yet.
h58c31cc0g2d98g477fga85cg5c6707971a57: I won't lie, I'm close to taking the devil up on his offer.
h7dd2d1f3g9c16g4369g990dgc4acb1305789: I'd choose servitude over oblivion any day.
hf61cd669g2c3eg459fg9e13g3f0ce394979b: But you're right, we probably won't change tonight. Maybe I won't have to choose either.
h8c725867g5a2eg48c0ga0ccgfb03e63ec605: We won't transform tonight, if that's what you mean. But you're right, it gives us some time.
hec35336cg97ebg415ag8c11g8075c08603f2: We don't know that we're turning. This could be anything.
h389ec649gba0bg4e45gbcd7ged5d3b516356: Oh, we're lying to each other now? Excellent.
hcfbc3ffag5f95g46e3gb5f0gb0abbbd0d0e7: Yes, it's probably just a cold.
he60b9fe3gddb1g4db5g8d1fg94206419ae7d: Oh you're a sweetheart, but no.
hca1e1963g85c6g4be6gbf0ege74f61a73649: I won't lie, I'm considering that devil's offer. Better servitude than oblivion.
h61600197g6b4dg418dg8834g463a19268a52: Still, maybe there's time to escape both. Let's see if we survive the night.
h1db6158fg1102g4f9agbcd0g6db6351ad0b2: We probably won't transform tonight. That gives us time to figure this out.
hea4dbcf7g1a86g459eg95f4g5cfefc69f8a0: Help me? You can't even help yourself.
h227147e8g7c24g4e7cgb0f6g2240ef559c6e: Look at you. You're shivering. Weak.
ha93b429dg6952g444aga9d2g029a6ec574e7: I haven't changed yet - I still have time.
hdd1226c1gfb87g4e8bg88aag37a2c663aa31: Of course you do, darling. You look radiant.
h89539903g2694g453cg9e5eg71c95b83dd42: Delude yourself all you want, I won't go so easily.
hb2cc1ee7g41ddg46bcg8b86ga172a17f8c0f: Now, if I can just contact Raphael. If I can make a deal...
h54db4896g5641g4e1fgb5c1gf8518778f018: How does one summon a devil? Candles? Entrails? There has to be a way.
h589d6353gccd8g46b1gbc58g5ba43cd9ff44: I don't know how yet, but I will find a way to master this worm. I will not let it take me.
hc2a14d51g4e8cg4ce3g83ebg134eb9f33044: Same as always. Do whatever it takes to survive.
hbeb7dc88g3ad9g4042ga6dfga88001753671: You said you'd kill me if it came to this.
h509ed18bg59c5g4455g8dbegc0973c0017d4: I'd love to, but my head's spinning. I wouldn't know which of you three to stab.
he964bca4g31cag473fg8560geed7664dd1ca: Find someone else to kill you. I'm saving myself.
hf96c036ag1aedg4765gbd47g28311a19f161: And I can smell the blood in your mouth. We both know what that means.
hd7b0fc93g5334g4bd5gb558ga6641f2eca65: Leave me alone! You're - you're not the one I need to talk to.
h72248eb0g1d27g424dg8fddg4185d9547b86: Leave me alone! I do not have time to waste with you.
